title: Breaking Minecraft Live 2024
description: It's so much worse than you think. Created for a video on Knarfy's Channel
body:
# Knarfy Breaks Minecraft Live 2024

### This mod is chaos and WILL break everything if you add it to a Minecraft world you like. So... don't do that!

This mod was made for a Knarfy video. Check out the original post here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8bWo7no_eUk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features and more information can be found in the Gallery! That felt like a good way to show what was in this mod.
